conditions.name: Tension Headache
conditions.explanation: Common type of headache due to stress or tension.

conditions.name: Migraine
conditions.explanation: May occur with dull pain, typically throbbing in nature.

data.action: Consider taking over-the-counter pain relief and rest in a dark room.
warning_signs: Severe pain that worsens, vision changes, or neurological symptoms
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
